summary: Iteration 35 - Portfolio Holdings Fix Testing: All 10 backend tests passed (2 skipped). Verified portfolio-overview and investment-summary APIs now use ONLY real holdings data instead of transaction estimates. No negative current_values, no fake categories (SIP, FD, Stock).

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing skipped per request (backend only)

critical_code_review_comments: portfolio-overview (portfolio.py:92) correctly reads ONLY from holdings collection, not transactions
investment-summary (dashboard_v2.py:291) correctly reads ONLY from holdings collection with XIRR calculation
Both APIs return 0 values when user has no holdings (verified via code review)
No negative current_values - all values are from real holdings with proper fallback logic
Categories contain ONLY 'Mutual Fund' from actual holdings (no SIP, FD, Stock from transaction aggregation)

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed, 2 skipped due to registration validation)

categories: Mutual Fund only - no SIP, FD, Stock

holdings: HDFC Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Plan (category: Mutual Fund)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio holdings fix verified. Both portfolio-overview and investment-summary APIs now correctly use ONLY holdings collection data. The demo user has 2 Mutual Fund holdings (HDFC Flexi Cap ~17K, SBI Small Cap ~10K) imported from eCAS. No negative values, no fake transaction-based categories. XIRR calculation working (13.52%).
